sections.paragraph: <item TEIform="item"> <hi rend="bold" TEIform="hi">Plutarchus</hi> Biographus et Philosophus [Plu.] <date TEIform="date">i/ii A.D.</date> <title_ TEIform="title">Moralia</title_> ed. G. N. Bernardakis, 7 vols., Leipzig (T.) 1888-96; cited by vol. (2) and page of Wyttenbach: <title_ TEIform="title">Vitae Parallelae,</title_> ed. C. Sintenis, 5 vols., Leipzig (T.) 1881-65; ed. C.
